data.body:
EVIDENCE for AC 'every child story landed on main via Gerrit (LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1)':

All 15 child changes are confirmed MERGED on Gerrit (queried 2026-07-19T01:20Z via GET /a/changes/<n>): #790 #791 #792 #793 #794 #795 #796 #797 #799 #800 #801 #802 (the 12 module splits), #804 (gate-fix da0d), #806 (Phase 2a 5f9d), #808 (Phase 2b a29f). URLs: https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/<n>.

Ticket->change map: inbound_differ(a130=#790), outbound_differ(a606=#791), runner(c1f4=#792), dispatch_one(744a=#793), lint_refs(2c35=#794), det_floor(e73b=#795), passes(9675=#796), gate_dispatch(5ea8=#797), _processors(10e3=#799), fsck(f87a=#800), reconcile(3c7f=#801), config(02c7=#802), gate-fix(da0d=#804), Phase 2a(5f9d=#806), Phase 2b(a29f=#808).

A change on this project can only reach MERGED status by a Gerrit Submit, and Submit is gated on the submit-requirement 'LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1 AND no unresolved comments' (CONTRIBUTING.md / AGENTS.md 'Git workflow — land changes THROUGH GERRIT'; only the review/CI bots cast those labels — no self-approval). Therefore every MERGED change above necessarily carried LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1. This is the external (Gerrit vote-record) evidence the criterion asks for; its 'done' proof lives outside the codebase (an operator/merge-gate outcome per ADR-0043), recorded here as an attestation.

Codebase-verifiable corroboration on main: .github/module-size-allowlist.txt and module-size-ceilings.txt are deleted; no src/rebar/**/*.py exceeds 800 LOC; the absolute-cap + admin-locked-limit gate is live in both workflows reading .github/module-size-limit.txt (=800); tests/unit/test_module_size_contract.py (incl. test_allowlist_mechanism_removed) is green.
